deployment_steps: Review code and run unit tests for frontend and backend components
Build and package backend Node.js Express API
Deploy backend API to production server or container environment
Deploy frontend static assets to CDN or web server
Run integration tests to verify frontend-backend communication
Monitor logs and metrics for errors or performance issues
health_checks: Verify backend API /api/phrases endpoint returns 200 with valid phrase response
Check frontend loads without errors and UI elements render correctly
Perform sample phrase generation requests from frontend to backend
Monitor server logs for errors or warnings during requests
result.rollback_plan: If critical errors or failures occur post-deployment, revert backend and frontend to previous stable versions using version control and deployment automation tools, then re-run health checks to confirm restoration.
